MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY RADEVERO, LINA AS TO DEFENDANT LAI, MAY LIN HOP CONSTRUCTION CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-26-2000 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RADEVERO, LINA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LAI, MAY LIN HOP CONSTRUCTION CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO $4,200.00 PRINCIPAL, $94.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,294.00, DISMISS DEFENDNAT LIN HOP AND CCSF WITH PREJUDICE. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
